message:
refactor(approval): deep cx threading through ApprovalStore cx-first fns (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Sixth caller-migration tick in the strangler-fig phase (after
reports.rs, export.rs, diagnostic.rs, search_explain.rs,
session_correlation.rs).

Two prerequisite storage cx-first siblings added first:
- `count_active_approvals_with_cx(cx, workspace_id, now_ms)`
- `consume_approval_token_with_cx(cx, code_hash, workspace_id,
  action_kind, pane_id, action_fingerprint)`

Storage cx-first coverage now at 55/140 methods.

Approval module migrated:

1. New private `audit_approval_grant_with_cx` — cx-first sibling
   that routes through `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx`.

2. `issue_with_cx` — count_active_approvals and
   insert_approval_token both routed through cx-first siblings.

3. `issue_for_plan_with_cx` — same two storage calls routed
   through cx-first siblings (the plan-bound variant).

4. `consume_for_plan_with_context_with_cx` — consume_approval_token
   routed through cx-first sibling; audit call routed through
   new `audit_approval_grant_with_cx`.

5. `consume_with_context_with_cx` — consume_approval_token routed
   through cx-first sibling; audit call routed through new
   `audit_approval_grant_with_cx`.

Previous doc comments on the `_with_cx` fns that noted
"StorageHandle has no `_with_cx` surface yet — 147 async fns
without cx" are updated to reflect tick 127's deep-threading.

Legacy `audit_approval_grant` and all legacy public methods
preserved unchanged.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 98/98
approval tests pass, including the
`issue_with_cx_matches_legacy_and_is_consumable` regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
